author: gb9t
content: Iteration 26: intel/igb.md committed (3cb4157, 184 lines). Intel 82575-I35x 1G NIC family — every enterprise IPMI/BMC interface + OS management network. SR-IOV-capable (first Intel SR-IOV NIC, pre-XL710). ~25500 LOC. Unique trust posture: BMC/IPMI port sharing via NCSI side-band — host OS must NOT be able to reconfigure BMC's port (would be remote-server-takeover primitive). Defenses: NCSI passthru opcode allowlist + BMC-ownership respect, same PF↔VF mailbox + VF spoof-check pattern as ixgbe, NVRAM CAP_SYS_ADMIN + LOCKDOWN (closes MAC-change-via-NVRAM attack). 26 docs / ~1.59M LOC. Intel NIC family complete: e1000e + igc + igb + ixgbe + i40e + ice + iavf. Next iteration: drivers/net/ethernet/realtek/r8169 — Realtek RTL8169/8125/8126 (every consumer motherboard 1G/2.5G NIC, every cheap USB Ethernet adapter).
